Optional account service: register (email required)/login/token resolution/logout/profile/stats plus password reset (requestPasswordReset anti-enumeration + resetPassword) using hashed passwords and opaque DB tokens.

Email delivery abstraction for password reset (Phase 5): ConsoleEmailSender (dev) / ResendEmailSender (prod via Resend HTTP API); createEmailSender returns undefined in prod without RESEND_API_KEY so the feature is disabled. Reset email content is bilingual (LV+EN).
Storage capability interface for users, auth tokens, profile updates, and account stats.
scrypt password hashing and verification helpers.

Server configuration loader for SERVER_PORT/HTTP_PORT, SERVER_HOST, DATABASE_URL, NODE_ENV, TURN_DURATION_MS, PostgreSQL pool limits, and WEB_ORIGIN CORS allowlist. WebSocket shares the HTTP port via upgrade.
Raw HTTP /auth/* routes with Zod validation, rate limits, bearer tokens, and CORS allowlisting.
Small in-memory rate limiter for auth route brute-force protection.
Bounded JSON body reader for auth HTTP requests.
Raw Node HTTP server for GET /health, GET /metrics, optional /auth/* routing, and default 404 handling.

Server entrypoint: loads config/storage/auth, wires MatchPersistence, OutcomeRecorder, optional AuthService, PostgreSQL leases/durable sessions/fanout, CoreMessageRouter, WebSocketGateway, HTTP health/metrics/auth routes, WS /ws, and graceful shutdown.

PostgreSQL-backed cross-instance WebSocket fanout bus: stores full fanout messages in `server_event_fanout`, sends LISTEN/NOTIFY payloads containing only event ids, prunes old fanout rows, reconnects the LISTEN client after listener failures, catches up fanout rows missed during reconnect windows, skips local self-notification lookups, and delivers broadcast/player/supersede messages to local gateway sockets.
Server event bus contract for local and PostgreSQL-backed WebSocket fanout delivery.

Room ownership guard abstraction for horizontal scaling: no-op in single-instance mode, lease-backed through RoomLeaseStore/PostgresStorage when available, used by CoreMessageRouter before room-scoped commands, and renews owned room leases on a timer in PostgreSQL mode.
Durable reconnect session store contract used by PostgreSQL mode so reconnectToken and displayId survive across server instances through the `player_sessions` table.

Client HTTP API wrapper for /auth routes (register/login/me/profile/logout/forgot+reset password/avatar upload); exports httpBase().

Resolves an avatar value to an image URL: preset id -> /assets SVG; 'custom' (own user) -> /auth/avatar/:id?v= serve URL; server-encoded 'custom:<userId>:<version>' (MP seats) -> serve URL. The single place avatars become URLs (used instead of avatarFilePath directly).

Client-side avatar compression (Phase 5, Canvas, no dependency): validates jpg/png + min 512px, cover-crops to 512x512, encodes WebP q0.85 (JPEG fallback). The 5MB original never leaves the browser; only ~tens of KB upload.
React auth hook storing token via safeStorage and hydrating /auth/me.
